message:
fix: Improve float format specifiers for 'g', exponential, and zero padding

- Add 'g' format case with trailing zeros stripped
- Fix formatSignificantFigures to switch to exponential notation when
  exp >= precision - 1 or exp < -4 (Python 'g' format behavior)
- Fix applyZeroPaddingWithGrouping to properly combine zeros with digits
  before applying grouping (fixes _._f format specifiers)
- Properly handle exponential format string building with correct sign

Fixes test_issue5864 and test_issue35560 in test_float.
